Idioma.MSG_DeseaAprobarYAplicarSP: Approve and apply the selected payment request
Idioma.MSG_EnviarAprobacionSP: Send selected payment request to approval process
Idioma.MSG_ErrorNoAprobarSPVacia: Error: You can not approve an empty request
Idioma.MSG_ErrorSPVacia: Error: You can not print an empty request
Idioma.MSG_ErrorSumaDebMayorCred: Error: The sum of debits have to be greater than the sum of credits
Idioma.MSG_ErrorSumaDebMayorCredMontosNoCedidos: Error: The sum of debits have to be greater than the sum of not ceded credits
Idioma.MSG_GenerarOP: and generate a particular payment order
Idioma.MSG_ImprimeSP: Prints the payment request after sending to approval or issuance processes
Idioma.MSG_TesoreriaOtraEmpresa: The destination treasury belongs to another enterprise
Idioma.MSG_UsuarioSinPermisosOP: The user does not have permission to generate payment orders
